para.name: discussion-of-grievances
para.heading: DISCUSSION OF GRIEVANCES
para.text: Upon request, any recognized and accredited representative of the Union shall be granted reasonable time off with pay during working hours for the purpose of processing grievances in accordance with the appropriate grievance procedure provided that there is no interference with work performance. The union steward or representative must make an appointment in advance with the appropriate management representative.

para.name: notices-and-communications
para.heading: NOTICES AND COMMUNICATIONS
para.text: A union steward or representative may visit work areas during working hours without loss of pay for the purpose of:

ul.li: Posting official notices on designated union bulletin board.
Transmitting union-authorized communications to the employer or a management representative.
